summary: This proposal introduces a smart contract wallet-based approach for managing tokens, focusing on utilizing the programmable features of smart contract wallets for asset management. Additionally, it introduces functions such as `tokenTransfer`, `tokenApprove`, `tokenApproveForAll`, `tokenIsApproveForAll` and `tokenAllowance`, which provide enhanced control over token transactions. This approach seeks to enhance token management by utilizing the built-in features of smart contract wallets, thus offering a more adaptable, secure, and efficient method for managing token transactions.
title: Contract wallet management token
